objective: Add eight distinct authored identities without palette swaps or demographic-to-geometry inference.
editorial_rules: Heritage and cultural metadata never select facial or body geometry.
Every face, silhouette, hair or covering, body, garment, and accessory combination is authored as one coherent identity.
No new member may be a recolor, costume swap, or device swap of an existing member.
Minor-coded H02 and H03 require explicit owner approval before public release.
Assistive devices are functional rig components and require device-specific review.
All members receive equal expression, motion, framing, 2.5D, and GLB quality.

planned_members.identity_direction: Latino boy with warm medium complexion, short loose curls, and an energetic casual silhouette
South Asian girl with medium warm complexion, long wavy hair, and a distinct contemporary layered outfit
White man with light cool complexion, short wavy auburn hair, and a distinct narrow facial silhouette
Latina woman with medium olive complexion, short voluminous curls, and a strong rounded silhouette
Middle Eastern woman with light-medium olive complexion and an authored modest head covering and outfit
Mixed-heritage person with medium-deep neutral complexion, a coily tapered hairstyle, and a distinct soft broad silhouette
White man with light warm complexion, a bald head with a close beard, and a broad stocky silhouette
South Asian man with medium warm complexion, silver swept hair, glasses, and a tall slim silhouette
